description_long: This is a rectangular, open-backed wooden shelving unit with three equally sized compartments. The structure is composed of light-colored wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and minimalist appearance. The top and bottom panels are connected by two vertical side panels and two internal dividers, creating three open cubby spaces. The back of the unit features horizontal slats that provide partial support and visual interest while leaving the compartments accessible from both sides. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a bench, low shelf, or display unit in urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or public seating areas. The absence of doors, handles, or glass panels emphasizes its utilitarian and accessible nature.
description: A light wood, open-backed shelving unit with three compartments and a minimalist, functional design. It features visible wood grain and is suitable for public or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments and the full width of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the panels and the depth of the compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the horizontal slats and open-backed design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the panel thickness and depth.
